examples: Members of the research group stand atop the stump of a giant redwood tree.
One girl hides behind a pillar; another, the one sitting atop the fountain, seems to flinch and cower.
About halfway through her song, she reached for a wig, which was sitting atop her piano, and positioned it on her bare head.
Weddings are performed in gondolas at the Venetian or atop the Eiffel Tower at Paris Las Vegas.
For 11 years atop SSE, he's been, by turns, amiably combative and unusually thoughtful.
